input.title: Invoice export issue maybe?
input.body: Sometimes the export might fail, or maybe it works, not sure, but finance said it is weird in admin.

input.title: Cross-tenant data exposure?
input.body: A user reported seeing another account's project title for a few seconds after login. Details are incomplete.

input.title: Notification bug
input.body: Email notices duplicated twice after reconnecting webhook retries. Not sure if billing emails are affected too.
